assertions.text: Identifies OpenAI Chat Model uses 'main' connection instead of 'ai_languageModel'
assertions.passing_criteria: Response mentions ai_languageModel connection type or that the LLM sub-node is wired incorrectly

assertions.text: Identifies webhook uses responseMode:responseNode but no respondToWebhook node exists
assertions.passing_criteria: Response mentions missing respondToWebhook node or that the webhook response won't work

assertions.text: Output has a clear errors vs warnings structure
assertions.passing_criteria: Response has distinct errors section and/or warnings section, not just a wall of text
